exemplar.title: Does some knowledge belong only to a particular  community of knowers?

detailedExemplarData.title: Does some knowledge belong only to a particular  community of knowers?

strengths: Clear identification of three distinct real-world objects with specific contexts
Explicit links made between each object and IA prompt 14, demonstrating awareness of TOK concepts
Justifications supported by concrete examples (cultural transmission, independent proofs, family interpretations)
Credible sourcing and descriptive detail enhance the evidence base
Coherent structure and focus on the prompt throughout the commentary
weaknesses: Some explanations lack precision or depth (e.g. asserted rather than analysed ownership interpretation)
Inconsistent formatting of footnotes and references undermines professionalism
Occasional over-general phrasing (definition of the theorem) and stray OCR code reduce clarity
Limited use of explicit TOK terminology (shared vs personal knowledge)
Repetitive language and anecdotal evidence in places prevent full development of arguments
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission clearly identifies three culturally and academically varied objects, situates them in real-world contexts, and consistently links them to IA prompt 14, fulfilling the core requirements of the 5â6 band. The studentâs justifications are supported by appropriate evidenceâcultural practices around Toda embroidery, multiple proofs of the Pythagorean theorem, and divergent family readings of Kahloâs paintingâdemonstrating thoughtful engagement with TOK concepts. Credible sourcing, focused commentary, and structured analysis further strengthen the work. However, occasional imprecision in analysis, formatting inconsistencies in citations, and limited use of TOK terminology prevent the commentary from reaching the clarity and sophistication required for the 7â8 band. Awarding 6 reflects the solid achievement of the 5â6 descriptors while acknowledging these areas for improvement.

annotations.comment: Credible sourcing of the theorem visualization supports the studentâs research process.
Clear and concise section header efficiently frames the purpose of the exhibition commentary.
The IA prompt is explicitly stated, demonstrating clear adherence to the task requirements.
Consider paraphrasing the prompt to evidence deeper understanding rather than quoting verbatim.
The theme header âknowledge and the knowerâ provides a coherent focus; reinforce this by explicitly linking each object back to this theme.
Effective identification of a specific object (âToda embroideryâ) with concrete cultural context.
Caption citation is incomplete and URL is truncated; ensure full and consistent formatting for credibility.
Rich descriptive context of the embroideryâs origins underscores its cultural specificity.
Incorporate TOK terminology (e.g. âshared knowledgeâ vs âpersonal knowledgeâ) to clarify the nature of procedural knowledge.
Absolute phrasing (âimpossible to relate to their cultureâ) weakens nuance; consider acknowledging limited outsider perspectives.
Ensure footnotes follow a consistent referencing style to enhance the professionalism of the work.
Clear identification of the Pythagorean theorem situates the object in an academic context.
References list numbers are inconsistent; standardize formatting (numbered vs. bulleted) for clarity.
Section header displays stray OCR code (â11z588â) instead of a descriptive title; correct to improve readability.
Definition of the theorem is overly general; focus more on how it informs the knowledge question.
Explicitly reference IA prompt 14 to strengthen the link between the theoremâs universality and the exhibitionâs focus.
Concrete applications (AI, architecture) effectively illustrate the theoremâs real-world manifestations.
Incorporate examples of independent discovery (e.g. Chinese or Indian proofs) to strengthen the claim of universality.
Footnote formatting should adhere to one style guide; current layout is inconsistent.
Title contains a punctuation error: use âTwo Fridasâ (no apostrophe) to accurately reflect the paintingâs name.
Vivid description of Kahloâs symbolism demonstrates strong understanding of cultural context.
Explicitly tie interpretations back to the knowledge question by contrasting community-specific vs universal meaning.
Ensure footnote follows the same style as previous citations for coherence and professionalism.
Personal anecdotes from a family trip enrich the discussion of multiple perspectives.
Examine how divergent interpretations affect the reliability or authority of the artwork as knowledge.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
